---
title: "Research"
---

# Working Papers & Projects

This page tracks active work streams. Public drafts and slides will be linked here as they are ready.

## Current Projects

::: {.grid-two}
::: {.focus-card}
### Barriers to mobility in urban labor markets
Short abstract coming soon.

<span class="status">Status:</span> data and empirical design in progress.
:::

::: {.focus-card}
### Gendered labor adjustment under climate shocks
Short abstract coming soon.

<span class="status">Status:</span> ongoing literature synthesis and model setup.
:::
:::

## Outputs

- Working paper drafts: coming soon
- Slide decks: coming soon
- Replication code: selected projects only

## Contact

If you want the latest draft of a project, email [h.balarama@lse.ac.uk](mailto:h.balarama@lse.ac.uk).
